NethraOps Agent

Package repository · version ${NETHRAOPS_VERSION}

Linux (APT)

Debian / Ubuntu / WSL. Imports the signing key under the modern /etc/apt/keyrings/ path (apt-key add is deprecated).

sudo mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings
sudo curl -fsSL ./keys/nethraops-repo-pubkey.asc \
  | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/nethraops-monitor.gpg
echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/nethraops-monitor.gpg] \
$(dirname $(readlink -f .))/apt stable main" \
  | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/nethraops-monitor.list
sudo apt update
sudo apt install -y nethraops-agent

Linux (DNF / YUM)

RHEL / Rocky / Fedora / Amazon Linux. DNF reads gpgkey= on first install and prompts to import.

sudo tee /etc/yum.repos.d/nethraops-monitor.repo <<'EOF'
[nethraops-monitor]
name=NethraOps agent
baseurl=./yum
enabled=1
gpgcheck=1
gpgkey=./keys/nethraops-repo-pubkey.asc
repo_gpgcheck=1
EOF
sudo dnf install -y nethraops-agent

Windows

Bootstrapper EXE

Bundles Python 3.11. Use this on fresh hosts without Python.

Download EXE

Bare MSI

For hosts where Python 3.11+ is centrally provisioned.

Download MSI 
NethraOpsAgentBootstrap.exe /quiet ^
    CLAIM_TOKEN=<YOUR_CLAIM_TOKEN> ^
    PLATFORM_URL=https://monitor.example.com

Signing key

All packages + repo metadata are signed with the NethraOps agent signing key.

gpg --import ./keys/nethraops-repo-pubkey.asc
gpg --fingerprint repo-signing

Download public signing key (.asc)

Verify a downloaded package

# DEB:
gpg --verify nethraops-agent_*.deb.asc nethraops-agent_*.deb
# RPM:
rpm --checksig nethraops-agent-*.rpm
# APT metadata:
gpg --verify apt/dists/stable/Release.gpg apt/dists/stable/Release

NethraOps agent · nethraops.com/monitor
